description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure, likely female, with long, textured hair and a serene facial expression. The figure is dressed in a long, flowing garment that reaches the base, and stands upright on a rectangular plinth. The arms are partially missing, with the right arm broken off at the shoulder and the left arm ending at the elbow. The hair is detailed with wavy lines, and the facial features are softly rendered. The surface appears to be made of a light-colored stone or plaster, giving it a matte, slightly rough finish. The overall form is slender and vertical, with a classical, timeless aesthetic.
description: A slender, classical-style sculpture of a standing human figure with long hair and a flowing garment, mounted on a rectangular base. The arms are partially missing, and the surface is light-colored and matte.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, long hair, and both arms (with the right arm missing at the shoulder and the left at the elbow), as well as the full length of the garment and the rectangular base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the drape of the garment, and the broken left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with detailed hair texture, the back of the garment, and the overall straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the right arm broken at the shoulder, and the side of the garment and base.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
